app.name: WAKI
home.nudge: Ka din bɛ nyɛla a ni ka shɛli dina. A laɣim shɛli?
home.quote: A mini n-tiri din shɛli ka a bɔŋ' shɛli.
consent.title: Pahi ka ti pihi
consent.noticeCompanion: WAKI nyɛla a zolunli shɛli bee n-sɔŋ i, ka bi nyɛ dɔɣita walahi therapist.
consent.noticePrivacy: A data ni be a phone ŋɔ — din shɛba ka bi gbaai walahi naai.
consent.noticeCrisis: Ka wahala ni zaa la, app din ni wuhi i emergency contacts shɛli.
consent.toggleLocal: Malgi mood data a phone ŋɔ
consent.toggleLocalHint: Di bɔɣim shɛli ni check-in, mood tracking, mini yɛlgu.
consent.toggleTrainHint: Pini usage yɛla shɛli ka a yuhi a yuli lala (bi nyɛ a yɛlgu walahi a maŋa yɛla).
consent.toggleCloudHint: Ka a bɔɣim la. Malgi a data cloud ŋɔ be a ti ŋun nyɛ di phone paaɣa ŋɔ.
firstCheckin.title: A laɣim shɛli pam?
firstCheckin.subtitle: Ti pihi mini check-in bini. Nyɛla din shɛli ka ni sɔŋ a laɣibu.
onboarding.languageSubtitle: {{roster}}. Tap the one you want to use — you can change this later in your profile.
onboarding.nicknameTitle: Bɔ yuli ka ti zo ni yuli?
onboarding.nicknameSubtitle: Yuli ŋɔ ni malgi a phone ŋɔ kosaai.
checkin.title: A laɣim shɛli?
checkin.subtitle: Nyɛla din shɛli ka ni sɔŋ a laɣibu pam.
checkin.followUpLabel: A bɔɣim ni kpini din shɛba ka? (ka a bɔɣim la)
checkin.savedBody: Naa shɛli ka a nyɛla saha ni nyɛla a ni ka shɛli.
conversation.safeguard: WAKI bi nyɛ dɔɣita walahi crisis service. Ka wahala ni zaa la, yɔɣi 999.
crisis.title: A mali alaafiya pam?
crisis.headline: Ka bi nyɛ a yɛnda.
crisis.subline: Ka a ni nyɛ sɔŋsibu tuma la, di nyɛla paɣibu shɛli.
crisis.barText: Ka a ni nyɛ wahala la, sɔŋsibu bɛ niŋ.
crisis.findHospitals: Nye dɔɣitiri yili a bɛ niŋ kari
crisis.footer: WAKI bi nyɛ crisis service. Ka wahala zaa la, yɔɣi emergency services.
toolkit.title: Sɔŋsibu Yɛla
toolkit.subtitle: Tuma yɛla shɛli ka ni sɔŋ i ni a suhu bahi.
profile.localData: A data be a phone ŋɔ
profile.sessionBody: Yibu be a ti clear a session ka labi pahi onboarding.
profile.logoutBody: Dina ni yɔɣisi a session ka labi pahi onboarding.
settings.title: Labisibu
settings.notificationHint: Nyɛ nɔnɔ bɛbiɛɣu be a ni nyɛla a maŋa dabɛ kam
settings.dataExportHint: Download a mood yɛla mini sessions
settings.exportFallback: Sharing bɛ bi lala a device ŋɔ. A export wɔ: {{path}}
settings.exportFailed: Ti bi ti ŋun yihi a data pam.
settings.restoreDataHint: Pahi WAKI backup file ka be device ŋɔ
settings.restoreFailed: Ti bi ti ŋun labisi backup file din pam.
settings.deleteAllBody: Dina ni yɔɣisi a mood check-in, yɛlgu, mini labisibu kam. A kuli labi nyɛ di.
learn.title: Karimbu
learn.subtitle: Baŋ a zuɣu yɛla. Yɛlimaŋli yinni yinni.
stories.title: Lahabaayi
stories.subtitle: Niriba ka shɛli sɔŋ i shɛli bɛ sɔŋdi yɛla.
offline.banner: Ka bi mali internet. Yɛla shɛba kuli tum.
permission.micBody: WAKI bɔɣim microphone ni nɔhi yɛlgu.
safeguard.statement: WAKI bi nyɛ dɔɣita, therapist, walahi crisis service. Ka wahala ni zaa la, yɔɣi 999.
